svg.title: Robot power distribution schematic
svg.desc: Full circuit schematic from 3S LiPo battery through fuse, SPST switch, TB6612FNG motor driver, DC-DC buck converter, RPi4, ESP32, and MPU-6050, with all GND connections to a common rail.
svg.text: Robot power distribution schematic — single unit
3S LiPo 11.1 V · F1 5 A · SW1 SPST · TB6612FNG · Buck 5 V · RPi4 · ESP32 · MPU-6050 · per IEC 60617

g.text: 3.3 V out → U2 VCC · U5 VCC
